definition: The portable, serialized partition-tree schema that dockable-window managers (dockview, FlexLayout, golden-layout) converge on: a recursive tree whose nodes are row/column splits or stack leaves (tab-stacks of panels), with optional per-node sizes (ratio or pixel) and an open extension slot for divergent popout/metadata/constraint encodings. Conformance is round-tripping the tree without losing topology, sizes, or stack contents.
usage: Standardized by the Dockable Layout-Tree Interchange Protocol (Web Layout).
